sources.note: Sheffield Registers of Baptisms and Marriages, 1560-1634

notes: Sir Robert Rogers — a knighted Englishman. Born 1565 in Hatton, Warwickshire. Father: Francis Rogers of Dartford (1536-1568, died when Robert was 3). Mother: Alice Benton (1544-1605, died in Epping, Essex). Married Cecelia Taylor (1580-1662, born in London). Daughter Anne Rogers (1590-1633) married William Copp — connecting the Rogers line to the Copp/Tewksbury/Gemeny line. Son Thomas John Rogers (1609-1670, born in Watford, Northamptonshire). Anne died 1633 in Hatton. Died 1639 in Hatton at age 74.
